overview: Yadav Dairy is a premium full-stack dairy e-commerce app with a Zomato/Swiggy-inspired UI. Features 60+ products with unique branded SVG packaging, bilingual names (English + Hindi), Internet Identity authentication, full cart/checkout flow, order management, admin panel, wishlist, dark mode, and search with filters.
features: 60+ dairy products with unique SVG packaging visuals — pouches, tetra packs, jars, boxes, tubs
All packaging visibly branded 'Yadav Dairy' — zero external brands
Bilingual product names: English + Hindi on every card
Zomato/Swiggy-style UI: sticky header, floating cart, smooth animations
Homepage: hero banner, category carousel, Trending/Best Sellers/Fresh Arrivals/Recommended sections
Internet Identity login with protected Cart, Orders, and Profile routes
Full cart/checkout flow: address form, COD + mock payment, order confirmation
Wishlist with heart icon, dark mode toggle, skeleton loading
Admin panel: manage products, categories, and orders
Search autocomplete + filters by category, price, packaging type, dairy type
Customer support: phone/email in header/footer, Contact Us page, live chat UI
